hero.headline: Medical Intelligence for Your Practice
hero.subline: Neuraxia automates your medical reports, monitors your economic activity and benchmarks your performance against the best European centers — tailor-made for you.
hero.subline2: For multi-physician practices, Neuraxia consolidates revenue per practitioner, tracks cashflow in real time and gives you full visibility on every strategic KPI — appointments, procedures, collections, receivables — so you can run your group practice, medical center or clinic with CFO-level precision.
hero.target: Designed for group practices, medical centers and multi-site clinics.

features.title: Everything your practice needs
features.subtitle: A complete platform designed for healthcare professionals who want speed without sacrificing quality.

ai_reports.title: AI-Powered Report Generation
ai_reports.desc: Dictate or type your clinical notes, the AI structures and generates the complete report in seconds. No more time lost writing, correcting and validating.

protocols.title: Operative, interventional, endoscopic & more protocols
protocols.desc: Protocols shaped around your own practices, specialty and history — not a generic template. Each protocol is validated, automatically archived and continuously refined by AI as you work.

enmg.title: Tailor-made process automation
enmg.desc: Every center has its own repetitive tasks. Neuraxia identifies and automates them — reports, follow-ups, reminders, internal summaries — so you can reallocate your human resources where they truly add value.

qr.title: PROMs & quality monitoring via QR code
qr.desc: Tracking patient-reported outcomes — pain, function, quality of life — before and after treatment has become essential for any serious center. Neuraxia provides fully customizable QR code cards tailored to your specialties and protocols, enabling frictionless PROM collection and analysis so you can continuously demonstrate and improve the quality of care you deliver.

economics.title: Real-time Economic Dashboard
economics.desc: Total revenue, collected revenue, backlog and receivables: your financial health under control. Dashboards by doctor and specialty.

stats.title: Advanced Surgical Statistics
stats.desc: Complications, reinterventions, adverse events, revision rates: visualize and analyze your surgical results in detail.

benchmarking.title: Connect to European surgical registries
benchmarking.subtitle: Automatic analysis of your surgical protocols, post-operative follow-ups and PROMs allows Neuraxia to feed and compare your results against major European registries — SIRIS Spine, SIRIS Implant, Eurocrine, EPICARD, EPITHOR and Eurostat/OECD databases — with no additional manual entry.

points.db: Automatic integration with European registries (SIRIS, Eurocrine, EPICARD, EPITHOR): your data is structured and submitted in the correct format without extra effort
points.ai: Real-time access to your center statistics — activity, complications, mortality — benchmarked against national and European references in your specialty
points.compare: Early warning system: automatic detection of significant deviations from European benchmarks, driving continuous quality improvement
points.privacy: Anonymized data compliant with GDPR and registry requirements — security and full traceability guaranteed

scaling.title: Scale your activity without scaling your costs
scaling.subtitle: Neuraxia is designed to grow with you. Each doctor, specialty, and site integrates without friction or additional staffing costs.
scaling.arg1_desc: Automatic report generation drastically reduces secretarial time. Your teams focus on what matters.
scaling.arg2_desc: Add a doctor, a specialty, or a new site in a few clicks. The platform adapts immediately to your organization.
scaling.arg3_desc: Calculate savings from the first month. Reduced secretarial time, fewer errors, better billing.

pricing.title: A solution designed for you, not for everyone
pricing.subtitle: You only pay for what you need. No unnecessary modules, no hidden costs. Every solution is custom-built for your practice.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for an independent physician who wants to digitize their practice.

cabinet.name: Practice
cabinet.desc: For multi-doctor practices with diverse needs.

reseau.name: Network / Clinic
reseau.desc: For multi-site organizations and high-volume clinics.

pricing.note: All solutions include setup, training, and updates. No hidden fees.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Medical practices that have transformed their work with Neuraxia.

items.quote: Neuraxia transformed the way we work. We save at least 2 hours of secretarial work per day, and the quality of reports is far superior to what we produced before.
items.name: Dr. A.B.

items.quote: European benchmarking is a real added value. We can finally compare our quality indicators with major centers and identify our areas for improvement.
items.name: Dr. F.R.

items.quote: The scalability of the solution is impressive. We integrated two new doctors in one day, with no friction. The return on investment is obvious.
items.name: Medical Management

contact.subtitle: Request a personalized demonstration. We show you the solution configured for your practice in 30 minutes.
